overall.description: First-person gameplay from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character eating at a noodle bar in a neon-lit Asian-inspired market alley, then standing up and walking through the crowded street past red paper lanterns and food stalls.

agents.ego_description: sitting at the noodle bar counter eating from a bowl

notable_agents.action: person sitting at the counter to the left of ego

entered.detail: metal counter with bowls of noodles, chopsticks, and condiments
hanging television monitor displaying news broadcasts
cans and bottles arranged on the counter surface

segments.scene_description: The scene opens with a first-person view sitting at a noodle bar counter in a dimly lit, enclosed space. Bowls of noodles and chopsticks sit on the metal counter while a TV screen hangs in the background. The character remains seated eating while another patron sits to the left.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered market alley with hanging lanterns

events.description: character stands up from the stool and begins walking forward
exits the covered noodle bar into the open market alleyway

agents.ego_description: walking through the narrow market alley passing various stalls and pedestrians

notable_agents.action: vendor standing behind a food cart preparing items
person sitting at an outdoor table near the alley wall

entered.detail: red circular paper lanterns hanging overhead in a row
mobile food cart with steam rising from cooking surfaces
shop fronts with glowing neon signs and awnings

segments.scene_description: The character stands up and exits the noodle bar into a narrow market alley decorated with hanging red paper lanterns. Walking forward through the moderate crowd, the camera passes market stalls with neon signage and approaches a food cart where a vendor is working.

scene_state.functional_zone: food cart area with steam and outdoor seating

events.description: character stops walking and stands near the food cart
steam from food cart cooking becomes more prominent in the foreground

agents.ego_description: standing near the food cart observing the vendor and watching pedestrians pass by

notable_agents.action: person with spiky hair sitting in a plastic chair facing the cart
vendor behind the food cart actively cooking and serving

entered.detail: white plastic chair occupied by a seated customer
large white plastic water jug with handle

segments.scene_description: The character stops near a food cart where steam rises from cooking equipment. A person sits in a plastic chair to the right while the vendor works behind the cart. The camera pans slightly to observe the surroundings as other pedestrians walk through the neon-lit alley.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person perspective that moves from the intimate, dim interior of a noodle bar into the vibrant, neon-lit bustle of a crowded market alley. It begins seated at a metal counter with bowls of noodles and a hanging TV screen in the background, before the camera rises and exits the enclosed space. As the character steps outside, the environment opens into a narrow street adorned with hanging red paper lanterns and glowing neon signage, moving forward through a moderate crowd of pedestrians. The scene then shifts toward a food cart where steam rises from cooking equipment and a vendor works behind the stall. Finally, the camera pans slightly to observe the surrounding activity and patrons seated in plastic chairs under the saturated lights of the alley.
